name: taqat-techno-plugins
description: Professional development skills for Claude Code - Odoo ERP, Azure DevOps, PM best practices, document conversion, video creation, and more

plugins.name: odoo
plugins.description: Unified Odoo development toolkit — upgrade, frontend themes, testing, security auditing, i18n, reports, Docker infrastructure, and server lifecycle across Odoo 14-19

plugins.name: devops
plugins.description: Azure DevOps integration - manage work items, PRs, pipelines, repos, wiki through natural language via MCP server

plugins.name: ntfy-notifications
plugins.description: Push notifications to your phone via ntfy.sh when Claude completes tasks, needs input, or encounters errors

plugins.name: pandoc
plugins.description: Universal document conversion powered by Pandoc - Convert between 50+ input and 60+ output formats

plugins.name: remotion
plugins.description: Create professional videos with smooth voice narration using Remotion and Claude Code

plugins.name: ui-ux-mechanics
plugins.description: UI/UX design plus Figma-MCP execution mechanics - design screens, wireframes, and design systems, and safe Figma MCP write workflows (net-zero write probe, metadata-lossiness handling, auto-layout/variant mechanics, prototype-link-safe edits) with WCAG accessibility auditing

plugins.name: rag
plugins.description: Operational console for the ragtools local RAG product — install, configure, diagnose, repair, upgrade, and run the local Markdown knowledge base. Knows the Qdrant lock, dual-mode MCP, and known failure modes. Does NOT re-implement search.

plugins.name: react-kit
plugins.description: Reusable React / Next.js implementation patterns with a flexible, Odoo-inspired admin-panel toolkit — app & component architecture, view-type chooser (list / tree / kanban / form / dashboard), CRUD + nested hierarchies, kanban workflow state machines, forms with tabs/relations/attachments, dashboards/KPIs, role-aware UI, loading/error/empty/access states, data-fetching error handling, RTL/LTR, React-19 migration, and analyzer/lint finding triage. 15 skills + 3 commands + admin-route-auditor agent. Generic and adapter-driven — entities, roles, APIs, and libraries are project-supplied.

plugins.name: qa-browser
plugins.description: Framework-agnostic browser QA and role-based smoke testing. Drives chrome-devtools / playwright MCP servers to login as each role, walk modals and table actions, verify UI vs API permissions, capture console / network / screenshot evidence, and produce PASS / BLOCKED / NOT-TESTABLE reports for UAT signoff. Ships 9 skills + 5 commands (/qa-target, /qa-smoke, /qa-roles, /qa-route, /qa-report) + 2 agents (qa-evidence-collector, qa-failure-classifier) + production-URL gate hook. Refuses destructive actions on non-disposable data.

plugins.name: docs-wiki
plugins.description: Generic toolkit for creating, organising, editing, validating, and auditing a project Wiki. Adapts to GitHub Wiki sibling repos, in-repo wiki/ folders, GitLab Wiki, and Azure DevOps Wiki. Ships 7 skills + 6 commands (/wiki-init, /wiki-audit, /wiki-update, /wiki-new, /wiki-drift, /wiki-sync-audit) + 3 agents (wiki-link-auditor, wiki-cleanup-validator, wiki-drift-reporter) + push-approval gate + stray-docs warning hooks. Owns flat-namespace + filename-uniqueness + internal-link conventions, Mermaid authoring rules, broken-link sweeps, and code-vs-wiki drift reporting. Does NOT handle wiki-to-memory sync (separate future plugin).

plugins.name: claude-env-doctor
plugins.description: Diagnose and repair the local Claude Code dev environment — MCP wiring, Windows/WSL networking (DNS/VPN/HCS), login/401 loops, LSP / Node-CLI spawn, Python output encoding, and Playwright browser-MCP setup. Read-only diagnosis first; safe, explicit fixes only, never blind mutation. The canonical environment-troubleshooting home other plugins reference. No secrets in reports.

plugins.name: agent-safety-guards
plugins.description: Generic agent-session safety and multi-agent workflow-reliability guardrails for Claude Code — credential-compromise response, read-only immutability, authorization verification, no-fabrication discipline, and reliable fan-out orchestration (small waves, null-safe reduce, journaled resume, verify-before-done). Advisory, never auto-mutates.

plugins.name: release-safety
plugins.description: Provider-neutral release, deployment, and migration safety — verify a fix is actually deployed to the target environment (not just merged), diff environment secrets before promotion, detect migration drift, and run risky cutovers/migrations safely (discover, backup, stage+validate, additive cutover, archive-by-rename).

plugins.name: django
plugins.description: Reusable Django / Django REST Framework engineering toolkit — ORM & model design, migration safety (zero-downtime expand-contract), views & DRF API patterns, settings/12-factor config, security auditing, testing (pytest-django), and performance/caching. 7 auto-activating skills + 5 commands + 3 agents + version/migration-safety/destructive-command guards. Generic and adapter-driven.

plugins.name: fastapi
plugins.description: Reusable FastAPI engineering toolkit — Pydantic v2 schema design, async routing & dependency injection, SQLAlchemy/SQLModel data layer (N+1 & async-session traps), Alembic migration safety (zero-downtime expand-contract), pydantic-settings/12-factor config, security auditing (OAuth2/JWT, CORS, injection), pytest + httpx testing, and async-correctness/performance. 8 auto-activating skills + 4 commands + 3 agents + version/event-loop/destructive-command guards. Generic and adapter-driven.
